phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Impressionist galleries are
phrases.text_local: Où se trouvent les salles des impressionnistes ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lay sal dayz ehm-preh-syoh-NEEST
phrases.cultural_note: The Impressionist masterpieces are on the top floor (niveau 5). Head straight up to see Monet, Renoir, Degas, and more with beautiful natural light.

responses.english: The Impressionists are on the fifth floor.
responses.phonetic: layz ahm-preh-syoh-NEEST sohn toh sank-YEM ay-TAHZH
responses.french: Les impressionnistes sont au cinquième étage.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Van Gogh paintings are
phrases.text_local: Où sont les tableaux de Van Gogh ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo sohn lay tah-BLOH duh vahn GOGH
phrases.cultural_note: The French pronounce Van Gogh closer to 'vahn GOGH' (with a soft French 'g'). His self-portraits and Starry Night Over the Rhône are highlights.

responses.english: The Van Goghs are on the fifth floor, room 71.
responses.phonetic: lay vahn GOGH sohn toh sank-YEM ay-TAHZH, sal swah-sahnt ay onz
responses.french: Les Van Gogh sont au cinquième étage, salle 71.

phrases.text_local: Où sont les toilettes, s'il vous plaît ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo sohn lay twah-LET, seel voo PLAY
phrases.cultural_note: Restrooms are on each level. Ask staff if you need directions to the nearest one.

responses.english: At the end of the corridor, on the left.
responses.phonetic: oh boo doo koo-LWAHR, soor lah gohsh
responses.french: Au bout du couloir, sur la gauche.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a café or restaurant inside
phrases.text_local: Il y a un café ou un restaurant dans le musée ?
phrases.pronunciation: eel ee ah uhn kah-FAY oo uhn res-toh-RAHN dahn luh moo-ZAY
phrases.cultural_note: The museum has a café on the top floor with a nice view, and a more formal restaurant behind the clock on the first floor.

responses.english: Yes, there is a café on the top floor and a restaurant on the first floor.
responses.phonetic: wee, eel ee ah uhn kah-FAY oh dehr-NYAY ay-TAHZH ay uhn res-toh-RAHN oh pruh-MYAY
responses.french: Oui, il y a un café au dernier étage et un restaurant au premier.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a cloakroom for bags and coats
phrases.text_local: Il y a un vestiaire pour les sacs et manteaux ?
phrases.pronunciation: eel ee ah uhn ves-tee-AIR poor lay sahk ay mahn-TOH
phrases.cultural_note: Large bags must be checked at the cloakroom. The service is free.

responses.english: Yes, the cloakroom is free, in the basement.
responses.phonetic: wee, luh ves-tee-AIR eh grah-TWEET, oh soo-sol
responses.french: Oui, le vestiaire est gratuit, au sous-sol.
